authority_boundary: provider-owned native Superset REST discovery is internal and not modeled as ANIP child composition
provider-owned semantic execution is internal and must not expose raw SQL as ANIP child composition
provider-owned chart-data preview execution is internal and does not save or mutate Superset
approval request is represented as capability outcome and backend save/update is not executed without grant

provider-owned dataset draft preparation is internal and raw SQL is never a caller or child-capability input
